evals.prompt: Onboard me onto this project. I just cloned it and have no idea what it does.
evals.expected_output: Creates state file, runs project-scan to generate docs/project-overview.md, presents detected feature list for confirmation, then dispatches design-doc subagent for each confirmed feature sequentially, then refreshes skill-catalog. User gates between each stage.

evals.prompt: 프로젝트 온보딩 해줘. 이미 project-scan은 했고 docs/project-overview.md가 있어. 디자인 문서부터 시작해줘.
evals.expected_output: Detects existing docs/project-overview.md, skips project-scan stage. Reads overview to extract feature list, confirms with user, then runs design-doc for each feature sequentially. Finishes with skill-catalog refresh.

evals.prompt: I need to understand this project fully. It's an e-commerce app with authentication, product catalog, shopping cart, checkout, and order management features.
evals.expected_output: Full pipeline: project-scan generates overview confirming the 5 features. Gate presents the feature list. design-doc runs 5 times sequentially (auth, catalog, cart, checkout, orders) with progress reports after each. skill-catalog scan at the end. State file tracks all progress.
